data.keyword: buy massage stone warming cart for spa treatment room

result.keyword: buy massage stone warming cart for spa treatment room

items.markdown:
For a professional spa treatment room, you can purchase specialized massage stone warming carts and trolleys from major retailers like **[MassageWarehouse.com](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/living-earth-crafts-element-trolley/)**, **Medical Spa Supply** , and **[Universal Companies](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/professional-digital-massage-stone-heater-6-quart)** . These units range from compact rolling trolleys designed to hold standard heaters to high-end, all-in-one stations that include integrated towel warmers and waste bins.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17145957514698370935&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9619927071882673970&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7589508664014187883&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/shop-by-department/treatment-supplies/parafango/#:~:text=Whether%20you're%20a%20first-time%20body%20wrapper%20or,source%20for%20all%20your%20professional%20spa%20supplies!)[[5]](https://www.konmison.com/spa-equipment-suppliers/#:~:text=Universal%20Companies%20stands%20out%20as%20a%20leading,skincare%20products%2C%20retail%20items%2C%20and%20educational%20resources.)

Professional Spa Trolleys & Carts

These mobile units are designed to organize heating equipment and supplies specifically for spa environments.[[1]](https://www.salonfurniture.com/design/skin-care-equipment-carts-trolleys.html#:~:text=CARTS%20&%20TROLLEYS%20Trolleys%20and%20storage%20units,between%20clients%20while%20keeping%20their%20workspace%20tidy.)

[![Touch America Universal Spa Trolley](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161259-4353-0139-0000-580dbe1f0cf8:14)
Touch America Universal Spa Trolley $2,220.00 MassageTablesNow.com](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:809727847472324628,headlineOfferDocid:17145957514698370935,productDocid:17145957514698370935&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjN2qzloaSTAxUrVqQEHctPBJsQgLcPegQIBRAC) Ask about

- **Features:** This high-end station includes a stainless-steel wax compartment, a built-in compartment for a towel warmer, and smooth locking casters for easy repositioning.
- **Storage:** Includes two drawers and an integrated tip-out rubbish bin to maintain a clean workspace.
- **Availability:** Offered at **[MassageTablesNow.com](https://massagetablesnow.com/touch-america-universal-spa-trolley/?sku=MTN03496)** for $2,220.

[![Earthlite Element Trolley - Rolling Salon Storage Trolley](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161259-4353-0139-0000-580dbe1f0cf8:15)
Earthlite Element Trolley - Rolling Salon Storage Trolley $695.00 MassageWarehouse.com](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:1040967496560398272,headlineOfferDocid:9619927071882673970,productDocid:9619927071882673970&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjN2qzloaSTAxUrVqQEHctPBJsQgLcPegQIBRAP) Ask about

- **Features:** A compact, stylish rolling storage trolley specifically designed to house stone warmers and hot towel cabinets.
- **Availability:** Available at **[MassageWarehouse.com](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/living-earth-crafts-element-trolley/)** for approximately $695.

[![Bilwa Massage Stone Heater Cabinet](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161259-4353-0139-0000-580dbe1f0cf8:16)
Bilwa Massage Stone Heater Cabinet $408.00 $453 Michele Pelafas](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:10960459235444892707,headlineOfferDocid:15661733187741536148,productDocid:15661733187741536148&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjN2qzloaSTAxUrVqQEHctPBJsQgLcPegQIBRAb) Ask about

- **Features:** A handcrafted wooden trolley with a sliding top section for easy access to the stone heater and a bottom section for a towel sterilization cabinet.
- **Availability:** Sold by **[Michele Pelafas](https://www.michelepelafas.com/product/bilwa-massage-stone-heater-cabinet/)** for $408 $453.

[![Enthermics Mobile Cart – 500206 – MS400](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161259-4353-0139-0000-580dbe1f0cf8:17)
Enthermics Mobile Cart – 500206 – MS400 $900.00 Medical Spa Supply](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:9995331654416012682,headlineOfferDocid:7589508664014187883,productDocid:7589508664014187883&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjN2qzloaSTAxUrVqQEHctPBJsQgLcPegQIBRAn) Ask about

- **Features:** Designed for Med Spas, this heavy-duty cart fits various blanket and fluid warmer models and is built for high mobility.
- **Availability:** Available at **[Medical Spa Supply](https://medicalspasupply.com/products/mobile-cart-500206-ms400?currency=USD&variant=44334340931843&stkn=802a4c64688b)** for $900.[[1]](https://www.michelepelafas.com/product/bilwa-massage-stone-heater-cabinet/#:~:text=%3E%20Trolleys%20+%20Carts%20%3E%20Spa%20Trolley,x%2016%E2%80%B3w%20x%2034%E2%80%B3H)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17145957514698370935&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9619927071882673970&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15661733187741536148&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7589508664014187883&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://store.directsupply.com/Product/mobile-cart-blanket-warmer-13854724?quantity=1#:~:text=Description%20The%20MS-400%20and%20MS-550%20carts%20are,way%20to%20maximize%20your%20return%20on%20investment.)[[7]](https://medicalspasupply.com/collections/enthermics-1#:~:text=Enthermics%20is%20a%20leader%20in%20patient%20comfort,luxury%20IV%20therapy%20businesses%20and%20med%20spas)[[8]](https://www.michelepelafas.com/product/bilwa-massage-stone-heater-cabinet/#:~:text=%3E%20Trolleys%20+%20Carts%20%3E%20Spa%20Trolley,x%2016%E2%80%B3w%20x%2034%E2%80%B3H)

Digital Stone Heaters (Countertop Units)

If you already have a cart and need the heating unit itself, these professional-grade warmers are widely recommended.

[![Master Massage 18-Quart Hot Massage Stone Warmer Heating Device](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161259-4353-0139-0000-580dbe1f0cf8:18)
Master Massage 18-Quart Hot Massage Stone Warmer Heating Device $169.99 Master Massage Equipments & more 4.5 (6)](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,mid:576462349326913650,imageDocid:4655178142624980781,gpcid:5670125867575718692,headlineOfferDocid:15702538676211934734,catalogid:3128168271426519056,productDocid:5665167228023875202,rds:PC_5670125867575718692%7CPROD_PC_5670125867575718692&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjN2qzloaSTAxUrVqQEHctPBJsQgLcPegQICBAC) Ask about

- **Capacity:** Holds up to 120 medium-to-large basalt stones.
- **Technology:** Features microcomputer temperature control and a digital display that shows the target temperature.
- **Price:** Available at **[BuyMassageTables.com](https://www.buymassagetables.com/products/master-massage-18-quart-stone-warmer-heater-heating-device?currency=USD&utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc&utm_campaign=Google%20Shopping&stkn=7f40983f1162)** for $129.99 $169.

[![Digital massage stone heater](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161259-4353-0139-0000-580dbe1f0cf8:19)
Digital massage stone heater $238.00 SpaSalon.us](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:11247502785998316350,headlineOfferDocid:12749110386207004846,productDocid:12749110386207004846&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjN2qzloaSTAxUrVqQEHctPBJsQgLcPegQICBAQ) Ask about

- **Capacity:** Holds up to 90 medium-sized spa stones.
- **Features:** Includes a double pan to prevent stone damage and a wooden spoon for safe removal.
- **Availability:** Sold at **[SpaSalon.us](https://www.spasalon.us/salon-accessories/digital-massage-stone-heater.html)** for $238.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:5665167228023875202,catalogid:3128168271426519056,gpcid:5670125867575718692,mid:576462349326913650&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1989484191825873317,catalogid:8609610333513268562,gpcid:13075407777773987785,mid:576462810939631545&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:12749110386207004846&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:12749110386207004846&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/dermalogic-digital-massage-stone-heater-281-0270/#:~:text=Dermalogic%20Digital%20Massage%20Stone%20Heater%20Simply%20fill,%282%22%20x%201%22%20stones%29%20Power:%201420%20Watts)[[6]](https://www.amazon.co.uk/Massage-Heater-Heating-Warmer-Volcanic/dp/B07MDGP36G#:~:text=EASY%20TO%20USE%20Double%20pan%2C%20prevent%20stones,spa%20massage%20to%20the%20proper%20skin%20temperature.)

Mobile Warming Kits

For therapists who travel or need maximum portability between rooms.[[1]](https://www.a.ubuy.com.kw/en/product/1BOUPWH6-master-massage-6-quart-hot-stone-heater-warmer-heating-device-black-1-count#:~:text=Whether%20you're%20a%20mobile%20massage%20therapist%20or,visits%2C%20events%2C%20or%20client%20locations%20without%20hassle.)[[2]](https://www.liberia.ubuy.com/product/QCHM5EBMG-stationary-massage-table-with-4-thick-memory-foam-80-l-x-32-w-premium-wooden-m)

[![Professional Mobile Massage Basalt Stone Warming Kit, 30 Stones](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161259-4353-0139-0000-580dbe1f0cf8:20)
Professional Mobile Massage Basalt Stone Warming Kit, 30 Stones $235.00 Universal Companies](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:8520287919368220749,headlineOfferDocid:11105685662481159189,productDocid:11105685662481159189&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjN2qzloaSTAxUrVqQEHctPBJsQgLcPegQIDBAC) Ask about

- **Features:** A waterless heating bag that doubles as a stone heating oven, including digital temperature control and a car adapter.
- **Inclusions:** Comes as an all-in-one kit with 30 stones, including large, medium, and specialty toe stones.
- **Availability:** Purchase at **[Universal Companies](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/professional-mobile-massage-basalt-stone-warming-kit-30-stones?variant=43256088133689)** for $235.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/live/video/04f09076d9ee4fc2a15b14e483b44cf7)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:11105685662481159189&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.amazon.com/Goodtar-Portable-Massage-Electric-Professional/dp/B07NQ6Q2GM)[[4]](https://www.ubuy.com.bh/en/product/M5UTNIFYA-30pcs-3-15-inches-basalt-massage-stones-essential-heated-rock-massage-stones-black-spa-hot-massage-stones-for-relaxing#:~:text=Includes%2030%20pieces%2C%20offering%20enough%20stones%20for,the%20need%20for%20constant%20re-heating%20during%20treatment.)[[5]](https://www.fernandas.com/product/hot-stone-kit-50-flat-basalt-stones/#:~:text=It%20%28%20The%20Hot%20Stone%20Kit%20%29,and%20toe%20sizes%20for%20hands%20and%20feet.)
